display_information.name: Precedent
display_information.description: Institutional memory for your team — never lose a decision again.
display_information.long_description: Precedent watches your team's conversations for decisions and commitments, logs them in a structured registry with links back to the original thread, answers "why did we decide this?" with real provenance, warns you when a discussion re-litigates something already settled, and nudges people about commitments they made. It also exposes the decision log to other AI agents via MCP.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Your team's institutional memory. Ask me why a decision was made, what was decided about a topic, or who committed to what.

suggested_prompts.title: Recent decisions
suggested_prompts.message: What decisions has the team made recently?

suggested_prompts.title: Why did we…?
suggested_prompts.message: Why did we make our most recent architecture decision?

suggested_prompts.title: Open commitments
suggested_prompts.message: What open commitments does the team have?

shortcuts.name: Log as decision
shortcuts.description: Save this message to the team decision registry
